title: Assigning assignee in automated new board creation
excerpt:

posts.author: Sam3 (Sam A.)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey!

Apologies if this has been asked before. I would like to set up and automation whereby an item in one board (has an assignee) changes status and this triggers an automation where a board is created based on a template.

My question is how can I make it so that the the owner of the newly created board automatically becomes the person who was assigned to the item in the other board?

Thanks!

posts.author: tibor93 (Tibor Tasi)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Sam3,

I am afraid there is no option to set dynamic board owner in this case. You can select one or more existing users only.

Regards,
Tibor
